findings.summary: Phase 3 plan over-specified file splitting; actual value was 4 path replacements
findings.proposed_fix: Plans should separate value-delivery from code-reorganization; gate on value not movement

findings.summary: Assembly+policy modules were dead code for 4 phases until user challenged. Should wire end-to-end consumer in Phase 0
findings.evidence: User feedback 'Is this novel arch, strictly better?' revealed zero production callers
findings.proposed_fix: Rule: Phase 0 of multi-layer architecture MUST include one end-to-end consumer with real data

findings.summary: Worktree agent cherry-pick showed other session's commit at branch tip
findings.evidence: b1d17b5 was pid 6468 infra commit, not a453a0c IR migration
findings.proposed_fix: Cherry-pick workflow: grep --all for topic, never trust branch -1

findings.summary: Read same files 4x each triggering dup-read hooks
findings.evidence: dup-read hook fired on clinician_summary.py and finding_adapters.py
findings.proposed_fix: Grep to locate, then single targeted Read with offset/limit
